_sources: Marketplace/spot-tier anchors (not hyperscaler on-demand). Values are approximations read from published trackers, anchored monthly/quarterly; the scraper interpolates between anchors.

H100: Silicon Data 'H100 Rental Price Over Time (2023-2025)' marketplace tier — ~$7.6-7.9 (Aug 2023-May 2024), $2.50-3.19 (H2 2024, index high $3.06 Sep 2024), $2.27-2.46 (early 2025), $2.00 (Jun 2025), $1.92-2.00 (H2 2025). silicondata.com/blog/h100-rental-price-over-time
A100: AIMultiple GPU index (~$1.62 band 2024-25) and vast.ai marketplace (~$0.72-0.93 in 2026, sub-$1 from mid-2025). aimultiple.com/gpu-index, vast.ai/pricing/gpu/A100-SXM4

H200/B200: AIMultiple + Jarvislabs trackers — H200 on-demand $3.82 (Jun 2025) -> $4.11 (2026); B200 $5.84 (Jun 2025) -> ~$4.40 start of Mar 2026 (Silicon Data B200 March 2026 update). getdeploying.com, silicondata.com/blog/b200-rental-price-march-2026-update
